channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Prime Day Deals: Best Tech Discounts Live Now!
item.description: Amazon's Prime Day offers major discounts on tech products, including headphones, TVs, and accessories. Don't miss out on these limited-time deals!

item.title: Grand Seiko Unveils Evolution 9 Collection Updates
item.description: Grand Seiko introduces nine new references in the Evolution 9 collection, featuring tapered bracelets and micro-adjustment clasps. A blend of major and subtle design tweaks enhances the lineup.

item.title: Monster Fantasy: Cozy RPG Announced for PC
item.description: Jotoyo announces Monster Fantasy, an action RPG with cozy life simulation elements, set to launch on PC via Steam. Release date and Kickstarter details are forthcoming.

item.title: RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR Glasses Hit Prime Day Low
item.description: The RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR glasses are now available at a new low price for Prime Day, offering a portable solution for gaming on a big screen. Grab them while they last!

item.title: Early Google Home Speaker Review: Fixed Power Cable
item.description: An early buyer shares first impressions of the Google Home Speaker, highlighting a fixed power cable as a major downside. Shipping begins soon for the device.

item.title: Android 17 QPR1 Beta 5 Now Available for Testing
item.description: Android 17 QPR1 Beta 5 is now available for Pixel phone testers, introducing new features and fixing previous bugs. Pixel 6 and 6 Pro support has returned.

item.title: Marathon's New PvE Mode: Vault Breaker
item.description: Bungie reveals Vault Breaker, a new PvE mode for Marathon that deviates from traditional extraction gameplay. This experimental mode aims to revitalize player engagement.

item.title: Windows 11 Update Introduces Point-in-Time Restore
item.description: Microsoft's KB5095093 update for Windows 11 introduces a new Point-in-Time restore feature along with various bug fixes. This update enhances system recovery options.

item.title: Best Prime Day SSD and HDD Deals Revealed
item.description: Prime Day brings significant discounts on SSDs and HDDs from top brands like Samsung and Seagate. It's the perfect time to upgrade your storage solutions.

item.title: Hyundai's Next EVs: Innovative Features Ahead
item.description: Hyundai is developing new features for its upcoming 'N' electric vehicles, building on its innovative virtual gear shift technology. Expect exciting advancements soon.

item.title: Konami Sues Over Metal Gear Solid 2 Source Code Leak
item.description: Konami is taking legal action to identify the source of a major leak involving the Metal Gear Solid 2 source code. The company aims to protect its intellectual property.

item.title: Anker Prime Day Sale: Up to 50% Off
item.description: Anker's Prime Day sale features discounts of up to 50% on chargers, power banks, and more. Grab these deals while they last for essential tech accessories.

item.title: Microsoft Researcher Uses Goats to Illustrate LLM Absurdity
item.description: A Microsoft researcher humorously demonstrates the absurdities of large language models using goats in 'Age of Empires II'. The quirky approach highlights AI limitations.

item.title: Fitbit Air: Smarter AI Health Coach Introduced
item.description: The $99 Google Fitbit Air features an AI-powered health coach, aiming to improve user fitness tracking. It's a promising step in wearable technology.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra: Unique Color Leaks
item.description: Leaks reveal unique color options for the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, sparking interest in Samsung's upcoming foldable device. More details are anticipated soon.
